title: [circt-verilog] zero parameter at module declaration fails when used

features.name: unpacked array with zero-default parameter size
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array declaration where the array size is driven by a module parameter that has a default value of zero

features.name: parameter override at instantiation with non-zero value
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation that overrides a parameter with a non-zero value, where the parameter's default is zero

features.name: integer parameter with zero default
features.description: Code should include a module parameter of integer type with a default value of zero used as an array dimension
